About the Graduate School of Natural and Applied Sciences

The Graduate School of Natural and Applied Sciences (FBE) has been accepting students since 2013 under the umbrella of Üsküdar University, which was established in 2011 as the first university in Turkey in the field of Behavioral Sciences and Health.

In our Institute, there are a total of 16 Master's Programs with Thesis and 13 Master's Programs without Thesis in the field of Science and Engineering Sciences.

Future scientists are being trained at the Institute of Science and Engineering

Following the developments in the fields of science, health and technology, Üsküdar University's Institute of Natural and Applied Sciences, which has an important place in postgraduate education and research activities, continues its efforts to train the scientists of the future.

Contributing to R&D studies

The Institute of Natural and Applied Sciences, which also contributes to Üsküdar University's R&D activities and aims to train qualified manpower to carry out studies in this field in the future, continues its academic studies at national and international level.

Education in command of innovations in the literature

Üsküdar University Graduate School of Natural and Applied Sciences offers visionary and fully equipped education with its professional academic staff and wide application opportunities. It is aimed that the participants of the programs deepen in their fields of expertise and create a solid foundation for those who want to pursue an academic career in the future.

There are the following programs within the Graduate School of Natural and Applied Sciences.

Highly qualified bioengineers are trained at the Institute of Science and Technology

Bioengineers are needed in the research and development departments of organizations concerned with human and environmental health. The aim of the

Bioengineering Master's Program

is to contribute to the need for qualified researchers who will conduct high quality research in our country and abroad and to provide scientific outputs that will increase the knowledge in the field of bioengineering to the service of our country and humanity.

Health organizations need expert molecular biologists

Molecular Biology Master's Program

; In addition to diagnosing diseases, preparing the ground for treatment and trying to understand the causes of diseases, it is a branch of science that is needed to determine the molecular mechanisms that may cause diseases or any physical problem in advance and to provide genetic counseling to individuals or to create the necessary life order. Therefore, there is a high need for molecular biologists in the health departments of organizations concerned with living health.
